headline: GM-Backed Momenta Rises in HK Debut After $752 Million IPO
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Momenta Global Ltd., a Chinese autonomous-driving firm, opened 1.8% higher in Hong Kong on Wednesday after raising HK$5.9 billion ($752 million) in an initial public offering, testing market appetite for loss-making firms that offer promising technologies.Most Read from BloombergGreece Offers Bounty to Catch Ravenous Fish Lured by Warming SeaChip Stocks Sink After Blistering Run as Oil Jumps: Markets WrapTwo Millennium Trading Pods Made About $3.7 Billion Last MonthMicrosoft’s Xbo
